import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a file spec"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/specs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Register a new file format specification. The spec defines field layout,
data types, validation rules, correction rules, and optional output mapping.
Once created the spec can be referenced by ID in transformation jobs.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
